original: This year marks exactly two centuries since the publication of Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus, by Mary Shelley.
translation_literal: 今年正好标志着玛丽·雪莱的《弗兰肯斯坦；或现代普罗米修斯》出版以来两个世纪。

chunks.english: exactly two centuries since the publication of Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus, by Mary Shelley
chunks.chinese: 自玛丽·雪莱《弗兰肯斯坦；或现代普罗米修斯》出版以来正好两个世纪

chunks.english: since the publication of Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus, by Mary Shelley
chunks.chinese: 自玛丽·雪莱《弗兰肯斯坦；或现代普罗米修斯》出版以来的

chunks.relation: 解释 Frankenstein 的副标题

sentence_patterns.explanation: or 后是作品副标题，用来解释完整书名。

original: Even before the invention of the electric light bulb, the author produced a remarkable work of speculative fiction that would foreshadow many ethical questions to be raised by technologies yet to come.
translation_literal: 甚至在电灯泡发明之前，这位作者就创作了一部非凡的思辨小说作品，它预示了许多将由尚未到来的技术提出的伦理问题。

chunks.english: Even before the invention of the electric light bulb
chunks.chinese: 甚至在电灯泡发明之前

chunks.english: a remarkable work of speculative fiction that would foreshadow many ethical questions to be raised by technologies yet to come
chunks.chinese: 一部非凡的思辨小说作品，它会预示许多由未来技术提出的伦理问题

chunks.english: that would foreshadow many ethical questions to be raised by technologies yet to come
chunks.chinese: 会预示许多将由未来技术提出的伦理问题的

chunks.english: many ethical questions to be raised by technologies yet to come
chunks.chinese: 许多将由尚未到来的技术提出的伦理问题

chunks.english: to be raised by technologies yet to come
chunks.chinese: 将由尚未到来的技术提出的

original: Today the rapid growth of artificial intelligence (AI) raises fundamental questions: “What is intelligence, identity, or consciousness? What makes humans humans?”
translation_literal: 今天，人工智能的快速发展提出了根本问题：“什么是智能、身份或意识？是什么使人类成为人类？”

chunks.relation: 说明 raises 的时间背景

chunks.english: the rapid growth of artificial intelligence (AI)
“What is intelligence, identity, or consciousness? What makes humans humans?”
chunks.chinese: “什么是智能、身份或意识？是什么使人类成为人类？”
chunks.relation: 冒号后解释 questions 的具体内容

chunks.english: What is intelligence, identity, or consciousness?
chunks.chinese: 什么是智能、身份或意识？
是什么使人类成为人类？

sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后的两个问句解释 fundamental questions 的内容。

original: What is being called artificial general intelligence, machines that would imitate the way humans think, continues to evade scientists.
translation_literal: 所谓的人工通用智能，即会模仿人类思维方式的机器，仍然让科学家难以掌握。

chunks.english: What is being called artificial general intelligence
machines that would imitate the way humans think
chunks.chinese: 会模仿人类思维方式的机器
chunks.relation: 解释 artificial general intelligence 的含义

chunks.english: that would imitate the way humans think
chunks.chinese: 会模仿人类思维方式的

chunks.relation: 省略 that/in which，修饰 way
way 后省略从句内部主语
way 后省略从句内部谓语

chunks.chinese: 继续逃避；仍让……难以掌握

sentence_patterns.explanation: 逗号后的 machines... 解释 artificial general intelligence。
way 后省略 that/in which，humans think 作定语从句修饰 way。

original: Yet humans remain fascinated by the idea of robots that would look, move, and respond like humans, similar to those recently depicted on popular sci-fi TV series such as “Westworld” and “Humans.”
translation_literal: 然而，人类仍然着迷于机器人这一想法：这些机器人会像人类一样看、移动和回应，类似于最近在《西部世界》和《真实的人类》等流行科幻电视剧中描绘的那些机器人。

chunks.english: fascinated by the idea of robots that would look, move, and respond like humans
chunks.chinese: 着迷于会像人类一样看、移动和回应的机器人这一想法

chunks.english: of robots that would look, move, and respond like humans
chunks.chinese: 会像人类一样看、移动和回应的机器人这一

chunks.english: that would look, move, and respond like humans
chunks.chinese: 会像人类一样看、移动和回应的

chunks.relation: that 从句内部并列谓语

chunks.english: similar to those recently depicted on popular sci-fi TV series such as “Westworld” and “Humans”
chunks.chinese: 类似于最近在《西部世界》和《真实的人类》等流行科幻电视剧中描绘的那些机器人
chunks.relation: 补充说明 robots 的形象来源

chunks.english: recently depicted on popular sci-fi TV series
chunks.chinese: 最近在流行科幻电视剧中描绘的
例如《西部世界》和《真实的人类》
chunks.relation: 举例说明 sci-fi TV series

sentence_patterns.explanation: 三个动词并列说明人形机器人被设想出的行为特征。

original: Just how people think is still far too complex to be understood, let alone reproduced, says David Eagleman, a Stanford University neuroscientist.
translation_literal: 斯坦福大学神经科学家大卫·伊格曼说，人们究竟如何思考仍然太复杂，以至于无法被理解，更不用说被复制了。

chunks.english: still far too complex to be understood, let alone reproduced
chunks.chinese: 仍然太复杂，无法被理解，更不用说被复制

chunks.relation: 说明 too complex 的结果
省略 to be，递进说明更难做到

chunks.english: says David Eagleman, a Stanford University neuroscientist
chunks.chinese: 斯坦福大学神经科学家大卫·伊格曼说
一位斯坦福大学神经科学家
chunks.relation: 解释 David Eagleman 的身份

sentence_patterns.explanation: let alone 后省略 to be，承接 understood，表示“更不用说被复制”。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主句 + says + 人名身份
sentence_patterns.explanation: says... 位于句末，说明前面判断的来源。

original: “We are just in a situation where there are no good theories explaining what consciousness actually is and how you could ever build a machine to get there.”
translation_literal: “我们只是处在这样一种情形中：没有好的理论来解释意识实际上是什么，以及你究竟如何能够制造一台机器达到那里。”

chunks.english: just in a situation where there are no good theories explaining what consciousness actually is and how you could ever build a machine to get there
chunks.chinese: 只是处在一种没有好理论解释意识是什么以及如何制造机器达到那里的情形中

chunks.english: where there are no good theories explaining what consciousness actually is and how you could ever build a machine to get there
chunks.chinese: 在其中没有好理论解释意识是什么以及如何制造机器达到那里的

chunks.english: explaining what consciousness actually is and how you could ever build a machine to get there
chunks.chinese: 解释意识实际上是什么以及如何制造机器达到那里的

chunks.relation: 作 explaining 的第一宾语内容

chunks.english: how you could ever build a machine to get there
chunks.chinese: 你究竟如何能够制造一台机器达到那里
chunks.relation: 作 explaining 的第二宾语内容
说明 build a machine 的目的

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: situation where there are theories explaining A and B
sentence_patterns.explanation: situation 后接 where 从句，theories 后又接 explaining 结构，层级较深。
explaining 后有两个并列宾语从句，分别解释意识本质和机器实现路径。

original: But that doesn’t mean crucial ethical issues involving AI aren’t at hand.
translation_literal: 但是那并不意味着涉及 AI 的关键伦理问题并不迫在眉睫。

chunks.english: crucial ethical issues involving AI aren’t at hand
chunks.chinese: 涉及 AI 的关键伦理问题并非不在眼前
涉及 AI 的关键伦理问题

original: The coming use of autonomous vehicles, for example, poses thorny ethical questions.
translation_literal: 例如，自动驾驶车辆即将到来的使用提出了棘手的伦理问题。

chunks.english: The coming use of autonomous vehicles
chunks.chinese: 自动驾驶车辆即将到来的使用

chunks.relation: 举例说明前句 ethical issues

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语, for example, 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: for example 插入说明自动驾驶车辆是 AI 伦理问题的例子。

original: Human drivers sometimes must make split-second decisions.
translation_literal: 人类司机有时必须做出瞬间决定。

original: Their reactions may be a complex combination of instant reflexes, input from past driving experiences, and what their eyes and ears tell them in that moment.
translation_literal: 他们的反应可能是即时反射、来自过去驾驶经验的输入，以及他们的眼睛和耳朵在那一刻告诉他们的东西的复杂组合。

chunks.english: a complex combination of instant reflexes, input from past driving experiences, and what their eyes and ears tell them in that moment
chunks.chinese: 即时反射、过去驾驶经验输入以及眼耳当刻信息的复杂组合
chunks.relation: 作 may be 的表语

chunks.chinese: 来自过去驾驶经验的输入

chunks.english: what their eyes and ears tell them in that moment
chunks.chinese: 他们的眼睛和耳朵在那一刻告诉他们的东西

chunks.english: what their eyes and ears tell them in that moment
chunks.chinese: 他们的眼睛和耳朵在那一刻告诉他们的东西
chunks.relation: what 引导的名词性结构作并列项
作 tell 的间接宾语

sentence_patterns.explanation: combination 后三个并列成分中，第三项是 what 引导的名词性结构。

original: AI “vision” today is not nearly as sophisticated as that of humans.
translation_literal: 今天的 AI“视觉”远不如人类视觉那样复杂精密。

chunks.english: not nearly as sophisticated as that of humans
chunks.chinese: 远不如人类视觉那样复杂精密

sentence_patterns.explanation: as...as... 构成比较，not nearly 表示“远远不如”。

original: And to anticipate every imaginable driving situation is a difficult programming problem.
translation_literal: 并且预见每一种可想象的驾驶情境，是一个困难的编程问题。

chunks.english: to anticipate every imaginable driving situation
chunks.chinese: 预见每一种可想象的驾驶情境

original: Whenever decisions are based on masses of data, “you quickly get into a lot of ethical questions,” notes Tan Kiat How, chief executive of a Singapore-based agency that is helping the government develop a voluntary code for the ethical use of AI.
translation_literal: 新加坡一家机构的首席执行官陈杰豪指出：“每当决策基于大量数据时，你很快就会陷入许多伦理问题”；该机构正在帮助政府制定一套 AI 伦理使用的自愿准则。

chunks.english: Whenever decisions are based on masses of data
chunks.chinese: 每当决策基于大量数据时
chunks.relation: 说明 get into 的时间条件
作 based on 的宾语
作 get into 的宾语

chunks.english: notes Tan Kiat How, chief executive of a Singapore-based agency that is helping the government develop a voluntary code for the ethical use of AI
chunks.chinese: 新加坡一家机构的首席执行官陈杰豪指出，该机构正在帮助政府制定 AI 伦理使用的自愿准则

chunks.english: chief executive of a Singapore-based agency that is helping the government develop a voluntary code for the ethical use of AI
chunks.chinese: 一家新加坡机构的首席执行官，该机构正在帮助政府制定 AI 伦理使用的自愿准则
chunks.relation: 解释 Tan Kiat How 的身份

chunks.english: that is helping the government develop a voluntary code for the ethical use of AI
chunks.chinese: 正在帮助政府制定 AI 伦理使用自愿准则的

chunks.english: develop a voluntary code for the ethical use of AI
chunks.chinese: 制定 AI 伦理使用的自愿准则
chunks.relation: 补充说明 government 做什么

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 引语 + notes + 人名身份
sentence_patterns.explanation: notes... 说明引语来源，后面身份短语又带定语从句。

original: Along with Singapore, other governments and mega-corporations are beginning to establish their own guidelines.
translation_literal: 除了新加坡之外，其他政府和大型企业也开始建立自己的准则。

chunks.chinese: 连同新加坡；除了新加坡之外
chunks.relation: 说明 are beginning 的范围

original: Britain is setting up a data ethics center.
translation_literal: 英国正在建立一个数据伦理中心。

chunks.relation: 作 setting up 的宾语

original: India released its AI ethics strategy this spring.
translation_literal: 印度今年春天发布了其 AI 伦理战略。

original: On June 7 Google pledged not to “design or deploy AI” that would cause “overall harm,” or to develop AI-directed weapons or use AI for surveillance that would violate international norms.
translation_literal: 6 月 7 日，谷歌承诺不“设计或部署”会造成“整体伤害”的 AI，也不开发 AI 指导的武器，或将 AI 用于会违反国际规范的监控。

chunks.english: not to “design or deploy AI” that would cause “overall harm,” or to develop AI-directed weapons or use AI for surveillance that would violate international norms
chunks.chinese: 不设计或部署会造成整体伤害的 AI，也不开发 AI 武器或将 AI 用于违反国际规范的监控
chunks.relation: 作 pledged 的宾语内容

chunks.english: not to “design or deploy AI” that would cause “overall harm”
chunks.chinese: 不设计或部署会造成整体伤害的 AI
或者开发 AI 指导的武器

chunks.english: or use AI for surveillance that would violate international norms
chunks.chinese: 或者将 AI 用于会违反国际规范的监控

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: not to design/deploy..., or to develop..., or use...
sentence_patterns.explanation: pledged 后有多个并列不定式内容，说明谷歌承诺不做的事项。

original: It also pledged not to deploy AI whose use would violate international laws or human rights.
translation_literal: 它还承诺不部署其使用会违反国际法或人权的 AI。

chunks.english: not to deploy AI whose use would violate international laws or human rights
chunks.chinese: 不部署其使用会违反国际法或人权的 AI
chunks.relation: 作 pledged 的宾语内容

chunks.english: whose use would violate international laws or human rights
chunks.chinese: 其使用会违反国际法或人权的

original: While the statement is vague, it represents one starting point.
translation_literal: 虽然该声明是模糊的，但它代表了一个起点。

chunks.relation: 说明 represents 的让步背景

original: So does the idea that decisions made by AI systems should be explainable, transparent, and fair.
translation_literal: AI 系统作出的决定应该是可解释、透明和公平的，这一想法也是一个起点。

chunks.english: So does the idea that decisions made by AI systems should be explainable, transparent, and fair
chunks.chinese: AI 系统作出的决定应该可解释、透明和公平，这一想法也是如此

chunks.relation: 倒装句中表示前句情况同样适用

chunks.english: the idea that decisions made by AI systems should be explainable, transparent, and fair
chunks.chinese: AI 系统作出的决定应该可解释、透明和公平这一想法

chunks.english: that decisions made by AI systems should be explainable, transparent, and fair
chunks.chinese: AI 系统作出的决定应该可解释、透明和公平
由 AI 系统作出的

chunks.relation: 作 should be 的表语

sentence_patterns.explanation: So does... 表示前一句 one starting point 的判断同样适用于 the idea。
that 从句解释 idea 的具体内容。

original: To put it another way: How can we make sure that the thinking of intelligent machines reflects humanity’s highest values?
translation_literal: 换句话说：我们怎样才能确保智能机器的思维反映人类最高的价值观？

chunks.relation: 提示后面对问题换一种表达

chunks.english: that the thinking of intelligent machines reflects humanity’s highest values
chunks.chinese: 智能机器的思维反映人类最高价值观
chunks.relation: 作 make sure 的宾语

sentence_patterns.explanation: 句首不定式短语作为话语标记，引出对前文问题的改述。

original: Only then will they be useful servants and not Frankenstein’s out-of-control monster.
translation_literal: 只有到那时，它们才会成为有用的仆人，而不是弗兰肯斯坦式失控的怪物。

chunks.english: Only then will they be useful servants and not Frankenstein’s out-of-control monster
chunks.chinese: 只有到那时，它们才会成为有用的仆人而不是失控怪物

chunks.relation: 倒装触发成分，说明 will be 的条件时间
倒装结构中助动词提前后的谓语

chunks.chinese: 而不是弗兰肯斯坦式失控的怪物
chunks.relation: will be 的否定对照表语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: Only then will + 主语 + 动词
sentence_patterns.explanation: Only then 位于句首触发部分倒装，will 提前到主语 they 前。
